product_planning_brief.human_intent: Establish a controlled agentic workflow where later agents follow explicit steering and approval rules.
success_criteria: A product-level backlog exists before sprint contracting
Features remain proposed, deferred, or blocked unless explicitly approved
assumptions: The current planning pass should remain product-level and neutral.

feature_candidates.title: Workflow Visibility
feature_candidates.problem_statement: Humans and downstream agents need a clear view of current workflow phase, completed agents, blockers, and next expected routing.
feature_candidates.user_value: Reduces ambiguity about workflow state before sprint contracting.
scope: Show blockers and required human decisions
acceptance_criteria: Workflow status can be represented without code changes
Blocked states and required approvals are visible
assumptions: The initialized scaffold includes progress and state artifacts.

feature_candidates.title: Approval Gate Traceability
feature_candidates.problem_statement: Agents need a product-level way to surface which actions require human approval before sprint work is selected.
feature_candidates.user_value: Prevents accidental approval bypass during later workflow steps.
scope: Preserve blocked status for uncertain features
acceptance_criteria: Approval-sensitive features remain proposed or blocked
No feature is marked approved for implementation
dependencies: Human approval rules from steering contract
assumptions: Human approval remains explicit and non-delegable.
open_questions: Which stakeholder should review approval-sensitive features?

acceptance_criteria: Workflow status can be represented without code changes

assumptions: The initialized scaffold includes progress and state artifacts.

rejected_or_deferred_items.title: Implementation Task Generation
rejected_or_deferred_items.reason: Implementation tasks belong to a later agent and would cross planning boundaries.
rejected_or_deferred_items.revisit_condition: Only after a sprint contract is approved and implementation_generator is routed.

updated_files.reason: Append proposed features with stable IDs

dependency_notes: FEAT-0001 depends on valid workflow state and repository map artifacts.
FEAT-0002 depends on explicit human approval rules from the steering contract.
risk_notes: Approval-sensitive features remain blocked until human review resolves open questions.

checks.name: allowed_outputs_only
checks.message: Only allowed planning artifacts are created or updated.

checks.name: no_implementation_details
checks.message: Feature records contain no code, patches, sprint contracts, implementation tasks, or QA results.

planning_report.summary: Drafted a product-level backlog with proposed and blocked features only.

product_plan.feature_summary: Two product-level feature candidates were identified without implementation details.
assumptions: The backlog should remain proposal-only until human approval changes feature status.
open_questions: Which stakeholder should review approval-sensitive features?

known_gaps: Approval-sensitive feature ownership remains an open question.
notes_for_harness_orchestrator: Review the recommended sprint candidate before routing.
Do not invoke sprint_contract_agent directly from product_planner output.
